name: The Prism
depiction: A beam of light refracting through a prism
effect: Immediately draw a card of each other suit 🌈

name: Funhouse Mirrors
depiction: Distorted carnival mirrors reflecting multiple images
effect: A 15-foot area gains magical cover, causing attacks to have disadvantage against targets within for 10 rounds🎞️

name: Clown’s Big Top
depiction: A colorful circus tent with clown motifs
effect: A 20-foot sphere forms with slippery, painted floor causing hostile creatures to make a DC [[13+d6]] Dexterity save or be knocked prone, allies gain difficult terrain for enemies 🌈

name: Illusionist's Spotlight
depiction: A bright spotlight shining center stage
effect: A 30-foot line of dazzling light blinds enemies caught within for 1 round unless they succeed on a DC [[13 + d6]] Constitution save 🎭

name: Carnival Fog
depiction: Colorful smoke swirling in playful spirals
effect: A 30-foot line of dense fog, heavily obscuring vision and slowing movement by 10 feet for one minute or until dispersed 🌫️

name: Carnival Lights
depiction: Twinkling, colorful lanterns floating above a merry crowd
effect: A line of floating lights creates luminous terrain in a 30-foot line, 5 feet wide, illuminating dim light and imposing disadvantage on stealth checks for anyone inside the line for 1 minute 🎪

name: Phantom Spotlights
depiction: Glowing lights focus on a 15-foot radius, blindingly bright then dim
effect: All creatures in area must make a DC [[12 + d8]] Con save or be blinded and deafened for 1 round, others have disadvantage on Perception checks for 1 minute 🎆

name: Spotlight Sanctuary
depiction: A glowing, circular stage light illuminating a 15-foot radius
effect: Allies within gain 5 temporary hit points at the start of their turn for 3 rounds while enemies are blinded if they end their turn in the spotlight 💡

name: The Great Tent Collapse
depiction: A giant circus tent ready to fall
effect: Cause a line of collapsing fabric and poles 40 feet long and 10 feet wide, forcing all creatures in the area to make a DC [[15 + d8]] Dex save or be knocked prone and take [[3d8]] bludgeoning damage

name: Magician’s Wink
depiction: A grinning clown face on a card winks with a sly sparkle
effect: Cause illusions of phantom hands to briefly distract creatures in a 15-foot cone

name: Trapdoor Fall
depiction: A stage floor panel swinging open revealing a pit
effect: Choose a 15-foot radius area within 60 feet, the ground there becomes difficult terrain and any creature entering it must succeed on a DC [[13 + d6]] Dex save or fall prone and take [[2d6]] bludgeoning damage🤹

name: Magician’s Misdirection
depiction: A deck of enchanted cards fanning out with a smoke puff
effect: Choose a 20-foot line within 60 feet

name: Puppet’s Grasp
depiction: Strings like marionette wires extend from your fingers
effect: Choose a creature in a 20-foot radius. They must succeed on a DC [[14 + d6]] Dex save or be pulled 15 feet toward you and restrained until the end of their next turn 🤡

name: Spectacle Strings
depiction: Marionette strings glowing with a faint magic
effect: Choose up to three creatures in a 30-foot area

name: Ringmaster’s Command
depiction: A charismatic ringmaster gesturing broadly
effect: Choose up to three creatures within 30 feet

name: Magician’s Mirror Maze
depiction: A series of fragmented mirrors reflecting light and illusions
effect: Conjure a 20-foot radius circle of mirrors that force enemies to reroll failed attack rolls once per turn while inside, but halving their movement speed as light confuses their perception 🪞

name: Carnival Tent
depiction: Brightly colored canvas tent with flashing lights
effect: Conjure a 20-foot radius tent of vibrant canvas for 1 hour that blocks line of sight but allows movement through, giving creatures inside half cover and advantage on Performance checks🎪

name: Fool’s Maze
depiction: A kaleidoscopic carnival maze twisting into itself
effect: Conjure a 20-foot-radius illusionary maze. Enemies entering the area must succeed on a DC [[13 + d6]] Intelligence saving throw or be slowed (speed halved) and confused until they leave the maze 🎭

name: Magician’s Rope
depiction: A glowing entangling rope suspended in midair
effect: Conjure a 30-foot line of spectral rope that restrains enemies in the line if they fail a DC [[14 + Charisma modifier]] Dexterity saving throw until the start of your next turn, dealing [[1d8]] bludgeoning damage on fail 🪢

name: Magician's Veil
depiction: A theatrical magician pulling a shimmering veil from a top hat
effect: Conjure a translucent veil in a 30-foot line that grants half cover to all creatures inside and lightly obscures vision for 1 minute 🪄

name: Magician’s Guise
depiction: A magician’s top hat with swirling smoke emerging
effect: Conjure illusory duplicates of yourself that fill a 20-foot cube, granting you advantage on Stealth checks and imposing disadvantage on attack rolls against you until the start of your next turn 🎩

name: Juggler’s Swarm

name: Stage Trap
depiction: A trapdoor outlined by stage lights on the floor
effect: Lay a magical trap that triggers when a creature steps on it, restraining them for 1 minute unless they succeed a DC [[14 + d6]] Dexterity save 🎟️

name: Finale Flourish
depiction: A magician’s cape swirls as colorful fireworks explode overhead
effect: Once per long rest, you can create a 30-foot radius dazzling spectacle forcing foes in it to make a DC [[15 + d6]] Wisdom save or be charmed and unable to act until the next turn 🎇

name: Getaway Trapdoor
depiction: A trapdoor with swirling curtains around it
effect: Open a 10-foot diameter hidden trapdoor that forces enemies on it to make a DC [[14 + d6]] Dex saving throw or fall prone and be restrained by illusory ropes for 1 round 🎟️

name: Clown’s Trap
depiction: A hidden bear trap with a red nose and bright colors
effect: Place a 10-foot radius zone that triggers a burst of magical confetti and laughter

name: Magician's Trap
depiction: A deck of glowing cards scattered in a theater spotlight
effect: Place a 15-foot radius magical trap that triggers when an enemy enters, restraining them with phantom ribbons for 1 minute on a failed DC [[14 + d6]] Strength save🎟️

name: Magician's Marquee
depiction: A glowing marquee sign flashing mystical lights
effect: Place a glowing marquee that emits bright light for 30 feet and dim light for another 30 feet in a 30-foot radius. Enemies in the marquee's radius must succeed on a DC [[12 + d4]] Wisdom save or be charmed until the marquee disappears after 1 minute 🎪

name: Magician’s Mirror
depiction: Two large magicians’ mirrors angled toward one another
effect: Project an illusory duplicate of yourself in a 10-foot radius circle that distracts enemies. Until the start of your next turn, all creatures in the area must succeed on a DC [[12 + d6]] Intelligence saving throw or have disadvantage on attack rolls against targets other than you🎩

name: Theatre Trap
depiction: An ornate stage floor with hidden trapdoors
effect: Set a trap in a 10-foot radius area

name: Clown's Cushion
depiction: A round red cushion emblazoned with a jester’s face
effect: Summon a 10-foot radius circular zone filled with bouncy, spongy material that cushions falls and reduces falling damage by [[2d6]] for anyone inside for 10 minutes🤡

name: Silk Canopy
depiction: Brightly colored silk fabric unfurls overhead creating cover
effect: Summon a 10-foot radius dome of silk threads providing full cover to creatures beneath it for 1 minute or until destroyed🎪

name: Illusionist’s Pit
depiction: A spotlight shining on a circular trapdoor
effect: Summon a 10-foot radius pit illusion zone for 1 minute, which creatures must succeed on a DC [[14 + d4]] Int save or become frightened and unable to enter or leave the area without using an action to dispel the illusion 🎩

name: Carousel Bastion
depiction: A circular platform resembling a carousel with colorful horses
effect: Summon a 10-foot radius ring of magical horses that generate full cover for creatures inside the zone for 1 minute, but creatures inside must succeed on a DC [[14]] Dex save or be restrained by reins for 1 round 🐴

name: Magician’s Cabaret
depiction: A magician’s hat and wand with sparkles
effect: Summon a 10-foot radius spectral carnival tent providing half cover and advantage on performance checks for allies inside for 1 minute 🎩

name: Magician's Stage
depiction: A glowing, small theatrical stage appearing on any flat surface
effect: Summon a 10-foot radius stage of magical light, granting advantage on Performance checks and providing half cover within it for 1 minute 🌟

name: Clown's Glimmer
depiction: A jack-in-the-box bursting with sparkling confetti
effect: Summon a 10-foot radius zone of dazzling confetti and flashing lights that forces all creatures in the area to succeed on a DC [[13 + d4]] Wisdom saving throw or be blinded and restrained by magical ribbons for 1 round 🤡

name: Carnival of Threads
depiction: Colorful ribbons and lights swirl in a chaotic dance
effect: Summon a 15-foot radius zone where difficult terrain caused by magical threads ensnares enemies—affected creatures must succeed on a DC [[14]] Dexterity save or be restrained until the start of their next turn 🎪

name: Banner of the Grand Troupe
depiction: A tall flag with theatrical masks waving in a breeze
effect: Summon a 20-foot radius zone of inspiration granting all allies advantage on Performance checks and saving throws against being frightened or charmed for 10 minutes 🎪

name: Theater of Shadows
depiction: A miniature stage with puppeteer strings attached to shadowy figures
effect: Summon a 20-foot radius zone where shadows animate to grant partial cover (+2 AC) to allies and impose disadvantage on attacks by enemies within the zone until your next turn 🎭

name: The Grand Illusion
depiction: A grand magician with swirling colorful smoke and floating cards
effect: Summon a 30-foot radius sphere filled with illusory doubles of yourself that impose disadvantage on attack rolls against you until the start of your next turn, usable once per long rest 🎩

name: Magician’s Handkerchief
depiction: A bright red silk handkerchief floating midair
effect: Summon a floating handkerchief that can move up to 30 feet on your turn. It can block a line of sight or attack passing through a 5-foot sphere around it, providing half cover to allies behind it until your next turn 🪄

name: Mist of the Magician
depiction: A magician’s hat releasing a puff of shimmering mist
effect: Summon a foggy 20-foot radius area where all sound is muffled and vision is lightly obscured for 1 minute, granting advantage on Stealth checks and disadvantage on Perception checks relying on hearing 🎩

name: Magic Top Hat
depiction: A tall, black magician’s hat with a rabbit peeking out
effect: Summon a magical object of your choice (weapon, tool, or small item) that lasts for 10 minutes or until dismissed. The object functions as if you had conjured it magically 🎩

name: Illusionist’s Shroud
depiction: A magician’s wand emitting colorful smoke
effect: Summon a misty dome with a 15-foot radius that grants creatures inside advantage on Deception and Performance checks, and imposes disadvantage on attack rolls against them for 1 minute 🤹

name: Weave of Armor
depiction: Interlaced shimmering threads forming a protective net
effect: Summon a net of magical threads in a 15-foot radius sphere that grants allies half cover and adds +2 to AC for the duration of 1 minute 🛡️

name: The Great Pretender
depiction: A painted clown face smiling broadly
effect: Summon a spectral clown that distracts enemies in a 20-foot radius

name: Juggler’s Web
depiction: A cluster of glowing, floating ropes intertwined like juggling pins
effect: Summon a tangle of spectral ropes in a 15-foot radius zone. Enemies that start their turn here must succeed on DC [[13 + d4]] Dexterity saving throw or be restrained until their next turn 🎪

name: Clown’s Buffer
depiction: A bright red clown nose glowing with magical energy
effect: Summon a temporary barrier in a 15-foot radius centered on you that provides cover and grants you and allies within half cover +2 AC for 1 minute 🤡

name: Clown's Prism
depiction: A colorful prism floating above a theatrical mask
effect: Summon an illusory circus prism projecting dazzling lights in a 15-foot radius

name: Mirrored Mirage
depiction: A series of polished carnival mirrors reflecting impossible angles
effect: Summon illusory duplicates of yourself that appear in a 15-foot radius for 1 minute, causing attacks against you to have disadvantage and confusing enemies inside the zone 🎪

name: Finale Curtain
depiction: A giant red velvet theater curtain drops suddenly
effect: Summons a 20-foot wide, 10-foot high curtain that blocks line of sight and provides cover, lasting 1 minute or until destroyed by dealing [[3d8]] damage 🩰

name: Backdrop of Tricks
depiction: A large painted stage backdrop featuring juggling clowns
effect: Summons an illusory 20-foot tall backdrop that obscures line of sight (heavily obscures) and lasts 10 minutes or until dispelled, providing full cover 🎪

name: Juggling Jesters
depiction: Three colorful clown puppets mid-performance
effect: Summons spectral jesters that distract enemies in a 30-foot line. Enemies in the line must succeed DC [[12 + d6]] Dex save or have disadvantage on perception and attack rolls until their next turn 🤹‍♂️

name: Clown’s Springtrap
depiction: A comically oversized spring-shoe snapping open
effect: Target a 20-foot line, forcing creatures in it to succeed on a DC [[12 + d6]] Dex save or be knocked back 15 feet and knocked prone with a popping startled sound🤡

name: Twisting Tethers
depiction: Spider silk threads weaving in a spiral around foes
effect: Target a line 30 feet long and 5 feet wide, creatures must succeed on a DC [[13 + d8]] Dex save or be restrained for 1 round as silk threads wrap them tightly 🕸

name: Jester’s Jest
depiction: A painted clown mask with a mischievous grin
effect: Target one creature in a 30-foot cone must succeed on a DC [[13+d8]] Wisdom save or be frightened and unable to move closer to you for 1 minute, while circus laughter distracts them 🤡

name: Marionette Trap
depiction: Strings attached to a fallen puppet
effect: Targets in a 30-foot line must succeed on a DC [[14 + d4]] Dexterity saving throw or be restrained for 1 round as invisible puppet strings control their movements🎭

name: Trapdoor Escape
depiction: A trapdoor opening beneath a performer on a dark stage
effect: Trigger a hidden trapdoor in a 15-foot square zone that allows one creature to teleport up to [[2d8*5]] feet to an unoccupied space within sight, once per short rest 🚪

name: Clown’s Laugh
depiction: A jester’s mask with a sinister grin
effect: Within a 15-foot radius sphere, creatures must succeed on a DC [[14 + d6]] Wisdom save or be incapacitated with uncontrollable laughter for 1 round 😂

name: Puppet Strings
depiction: Delicate glowing strings floating above a theater stage
effect: You can control an object or unattended creature within 30 feet, granting you advantage on checks and saving throws for 1 minute, but it is visible and makes slight movements revealing your control🪢

name: Juggler’s Gambit
depiction: A hand tossing glowing juggling balls in the air
effect: You conjure 3 spectral juggling balls that orbit a point within 30 feet, causing disadvantage on ranged attack rolls for enemies inside the 10-foot radius sphere while lasting 1 minute 🎭

name: Puppet’s Embrace
depiction: Strings and puppet hands on a shadowy stage background
effect: You create spectral strings in a 30-foot radius around a point you can see. Enemies must succeed on a DC [[13 + d4]] Dexterity save or be restrained until the end of their next turn 🎭

name: Magician’s Shade
depiction: A shadowy figure bows with a flourish as smoke billows
effect: You summon an illusory double that occupies a 10-foot space, granting you advantage on Stealth checks and causing attackers to have disadvantage on attacks against you for 1 minute 🎩
